items.experience: Full-Stack core with 3+ years shipping production apps

companies.name: CooWeb LLC
highlights: Design and ship full-stack applications end-to-end, from React/Next.js interfaces to backend APIs and database layers, integrating AI capabilities as a core part of the product experience.
Architect AI-driven automation solutions across internal and external workflows, designing agentic systems with LLM APIs that orchestrate tool use, data retrieval and business logic.
Build production-grade backend services and APIs supporting both traditional product features and AI-powered functionality, ensuring scalability, observability and maintainability.
Develop responsive, type-safe frontend experiences with React, Next.js and TypeScript, including streaming UIs for real-time LLM interactions and complex stateful flows.
Lead technical decision-making across the full stack — from database schema design and API contracts to LLM selection, prompt design and integration patterns aligned with product objectives.
Act as technical lead and mentor for junior engineers, providing code reviews, architectural guidance and unblocking support across multiple concurrent projects.
Maintain strong engineering standards through clean code principles, modular architecture and production-grade practices across both traditional and AI-powered systems.

companies.name: Cryptomex
highlights: Owned the development and evolution of a production Web3 platform, applying clean code principles and scalable frontend architecture using React, Next.js and TypeScript.
Designed and integrated multiple third-party services and APIs within a Web3-driven architecture, supporting high-volume payment flows and smart contract-based features.
Led frontend architecture and performance improvements, reducing bottlenecks and improving application speed, reliability and maintainability.
Collaborated closely with product, backend and blockchain teams to deliver customer-facing features used daily in production.
Contributed to AI-powered internal tools and automation workflows to support business operations and improve team productivity.
Identified technical risks early and delivered production-ready solutions with a strong focus on scalability and long-term maintainability.

companies.name: Virtual Tech
highlights: Delivered end-to-end full-stack features using React, TypeScript and RESTful services, ensuring seamless integration between frontend interfaces and backend systems.
Acted as a cross-functional bridge between frontend and backend teams, aligning API design, data contracts and implementation to ensure consistent and scalable data flows.
Partnered directly with clients and stakeholders to translate business requirements into production-ready technical solutions with long-term scalability in mind.
Took full ownership of feature lifecycles — from requirements analysis and system design to implementation, testing and production release.

companies.name: Freelance
highlights: Partnered directly with startups and small businesses to design, architect and deliver production-ready web applications from concept to launch.
Led end-to-end development across frontend and backend layers, making architectural decisions that prioritized scalability, maintainability and performance.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services to support business-critical workflows.
Managed full deployment lifecycle, including cloud configuration, environment setup and release processes.

companies.name: Somos Blumer
highlights: Strengthened foundations in frontend and backend development through hands-on training and real project contributions.
Assisted in the development and maintenance of application features under the guidance of senior engineers.
Participated in debugging, testing and code reviews to improve code quality and reliability.
Collaborated closely with team members to understand system architecture, workflows and best development practices.
Quickly adopted new technologies and tools, demonstrating a strong learning mindset and adaptability.

items.title: VotoLoco — Civic Affinity Platform
items.shortDescription: Production civic platform for Colombia's 2026 elections. 100k+ visits, 12k+ affinity tests completed, featured on national radio — all running on under USD 10/month of infrastructure.
items.fullDescription:
VotoLoco is a production civic platform built for Colombia's 2026 presidential elections. Users take a 10-axis affinity quiz that compares their views to each candidate's official government program — with verbatim citations and the exact PDF page where each posture comes from.

I designed and built it end-to-end as Tech Lead and Backend Architect, from commit zero to stable production in 6 weeks. In production it served 100k+ visits, 12k+ completed tests, peaks of 1.2k concurrent users under load testing and 99.95% uptime — all on under USD 10/month of infrastructure. Featured on Colombian national radio.

Stack: NestJS + TypeScript + Postgres with Row-Level Security, a Bull/Redis async job queue and an Anthropic Claude pipeline (Sonnet for posture extraction, Haiku for chunk classification). The two-stage AI pipeline ingested 8 official PDFs (60-200 pages each), processed 8M+ tokens with full traceability and recorded zero double-billing thanks to idempotent endpoints. Frontend on Next.js 16 + React 19 + shadcn/ui, deployed on Vercel + Railway with Sentry observability.

Compliance was treated as a functional requirement from day zero: CNE Resolución 2/2023 (programmable electoral silence guard), Ley 996/2005 (measuring affinity, not vote intent) and Ley 1581 Habeas Data (anonymous-by-design, granular opt-in). Zero security incidents recorded.

items.name: Heric Olier
items.content: David is an exceptional engineer. His attention to detail and ability to ship pixel-perfect, production-grade interfaces is impressive. He quickly became a key player in our Web3 platform development.

items.name: Danilo Ibáñez
items.content: Working with David on Web3 and AI-driven integrations was a pleasure. He has a great ability to translate complex requirements into seamless user experiences and always delivers high-quality work on time.

items.name: Diego Barona
items.content: David showed incredible growth during his time with us. His eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies — including AI and LLM tooling — made him stand out. A true team player with a solid full-stack understanding!

items.name: José Manuel Cuello Royo
items.content: David has an excellent eye for both frontend and backend architecture. He not only implements features flawlessly but also provides valuable technical insights that improve the overall product quality.

steps.description: Started my journey in software development, diving deep into HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Built my first projects and fell in love with creating interactive web experiences.

steps.description: Joined Somos Blumer as a Junior Software Engineer in Barranquilla. Strengthened my foundations through hands-on training, learned from senior engineers and contributed to real projects.

steps.title: Frontend & Web3 at Cryptomex
steps.description: Spent almost two years at Cryptomex as a Frontend/Web3 Engineer. Built and scaled a Web3 platform that processes millions in monthly transactions, while diving into AI-powered internal tools and automations.

steps.title: Full Stack AI Engineer
steps.description: Joined CooWeb LLC as a Full Stack AI Engineer. Designing and shipping agentic systems, LLM-powered products and full-stack platforms — leading technical decisions across the stack and mentoring junior engineers.
